title: What’s going on with Developers and AI?
summary: Google Cloud Tech explores how AI tools and LLMs are reshaping the software development landscape, including the emergence of "vibe coding" practices. The video argues that AI-powered tools like Google AI Studio are making application development more accessible and that this is an exciting time for developers.
